steps.title: Identify the pattern being explained
steps.content: The passage describes these beads appearing in many MSA sites across western North Africa—indicating a pattern of widespread geographic distribution.

steps.title: Match the answer to the causal factors
steps.content: Ubiquity means widespread presence or prevalence, explained here by two factors: symbolic behavior evolution (which motivated humans to create ornaments) and shell availability (which provided the materials). These causes naturally produce widespread distribution. The other options describe unrelated qualities the passage doesn't invoke. That matches choice C — C is correct.
